items.title: Stock Market Today, Dec. 16: Pfizer Falls After Cutting 2025 Revenue Forecast
items.description: Today, Dec. 16, 2025, Pfizer's shrinking COVID cash flows could mean little growth next year as M&A bets will take time to deliver.

items.title: Stocks give up gain, Nasdaq drops led by Oracle: Live updates
items.description: The S&P 500 and the Dow Industrials each booked a third consecutive losing session on Tuesday.

items.title: Pharma M&A deal value up 31% YoY in 2025YTD amid return of mega-deals
items.description: Large M&A transactions and bidding wars for Metsera and Avadel announced in H2 2025 reflect a need for large pharma companies to replenish pipelines through M&A ahead of looming patent cliffs.

items.title: Dow falls nearly 250 points on losses in shares of UnitedHealth, Johnson & Johnson
items.description: Dow falls nearly 250 points on losses in shares of UnitedHealth, Johnson & Johnson

items.title: 3 Healthcare Giants Just Raised Dividends—Here’s Who Pays the Most
items.description: Healthcare behemoths, including the biggest name of them all, are increasing their dividends. Additionally, AMGN's dividend yield now sits solidly above 3%.
